data.title: 国际服新年礼物
data.summary: [New Year's Appreciation Gift] Sensei, Thank you for the love and support you’ve shown in 2022. Don’
data.body:
[New Year's Appreciation Gift]

Sensei, Thank you for the love and support you’ve shown in 2022. Don’t miss our “Appreciation Letter&Gifts.”
The gifts will be delivered to your Mailbox every day at 3:00 AM (UTC). Be sure to check your Mailbox!🎁

#BlueArchive
